(;B[bc]TR[ce][cd][de][cf]LB[dh:B]C[This is a solid play which defended Black's weakness while threatening a followup -- to attack the two separated white groups. White would likely play at B next. RIGHT])
(;B[bh];W[cb]TR[bg][cg]SQ[eb][db][dc]C[Next F18 and B14 are miai for white. This loses about 13 points. Black would likely to capture the stones marked with a triangle but this is not sufficient, the stones marked with a square would then be dead. ])
